aeo_readiness.summary: Dallas Air Pros is moderately positioned for AI citations but lacks critical content and schema optimizations to ensure AI assistants recognize and recommend them as a top HVAC authority.
quick_wins: Implement FAQPage schema with common HVAC questions and detailed answers.
Add HowTo schema for common HVAC maintenance or installation processes.

gbp_analysis.summary: The Google Business Profile is well-optimized with a strong rating, photos, and contact information, but posts and Q&A engagement are lacking.
critical_issues: No active management of Q&A section.

nap_citations.summary: NAP consistency is perfect with no issues detected.
action_items: Maintain current NAP consistency across all platforms.
Regularly audit citations to ensure ongoing accuracy.

ai_visibility_gap.primary_gap: Lack of structured data and conversational content limits AI recognition.
ai_visibility_gap.invisible_for: Queries related to 'emergency HVAC repair in Plano' or 'top HVAC companies in DFW'.
ai_visibility_gap.low_hanging_fruit: Implementing FAQPage schema with detailed HVAC Q&A content.
ai_visibility_gap.authority_opportunity: Position as the go-to HVAC expert by creating in-depth content on complex HVAC topics and leveraging schema markup.

agency_pitch.hook: Unlock AI-driven leads by making Dallas Air Pros the most cited HVAC expert in DFW.
agency_pitch.pain_point: Without AI optimization, they're missing out on 40% of potential leads from voice and AI search users.
agency_pitch.proof_point: Their website lacks FAQ and HowTo schema, which are crucial for AI to cite their expertise.
agency_pitch.solution: Our AEO strategy integrates schema markup, conversational content, and GBP optimization to ensure AI models recognize and recommend Dallas Air Pros as the top HVAC authority.
agency_pitch.impact_estimate: Expect a 30% increase in AI-driven leads within the first 6 months.
agency_pitch.urgency: Competitors are already optimizing for AI search—waiting means losing ground and potential customers.

email_subject_line: Unlock AI-Driven Leads for Dallas Air Pros Today!
opening_line: We analyzed your website and identified key opportunities to boost your visibility with AI search and voice assistants.
cta: Let's schedule a call to discuss how we can optimize your online presence for AI and secure more HVAC leads.
